blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,461 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.
